title: What actually works for CURIO — derived from Curio's own 6 posted videos, not external trends
evidenceTier: HIGHEST — Curio's own platform-separated posted analytics

rankedByRetention.opening: ANOMALY-FIRST (a hand grabs the diver back)

finding_1_archetype.status: CONFIRMED by our own repeated results
finding_1_archetype.claim: SURVIVAL + anomaly-first is the only archetype that has ever retained for Curio: 2 of 2 survival posts are the top-2 retainers; 0 of 4 non-survival posts retained.
finding_1_archetype.caveat: CONFOUNDED — both survival posts also had the strongest openings. Category and opening quality cannot be fully separated on n=6. Do not promote 'survival' alone as the cause.

finding_2_strange_science.implication: This retroactively contextualises MICROGRAVITY-FLAME: it was strange-science, the category with no Curio win yet. Worth noting alongside its production problems.

finding_3_advocacy_is_THE_unsolved_probl.claim: Curio can win retention but has NEVER generated advocacy. Best-ever sharing is Third Man at 2 shares / 2 saves / 2 comments. Harrison won retention decisively (skip 36.5%, watch 66.2%) and still produced 0 shares, 0 saves, 0 comments.
finding_3_advocacy_is_THE_unsolved_probl.implication: Retention is close to solved; ADVOCACY is the open problem. Per Rule 47 the lever is a TRANSFERABLE payoff sentence — a fact the viewer must repeat to someone. Harrison's procedural ending is the counter-example.

rep1_fit.archetype_match: REP-1 is survival + named phenomenon + anomaly-first — precisely the 2-for-2 pattern.
rep1_fit.advocacy_design: The payoff must carry the transferable fact: people freezing to death undress because they suddenly feel they are burning, and nearly all then hide like animals. That is a 'tell someone this' fact, unlike Harrison's procedural close.
rep1_fit.risk: Advocacy has failed on every post including retention winners. REP-1 should be judged on the THREE GATES separately (scroll-stop / retention / advocacy) — a retention win with zero shares is a partial result, not a success.

_discipline: Derived from data/posted-experiments.json. Supersedes nothing; complements VIRAL_PLAYBOOK. External vidIQ outliers stay candidate-tier and never outrank this.
